prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis of pyridine (C₅H₅N, 11 atoms) computed with the chemkit fukui-reactivity skill.

Method: DFT, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, density-fit/RI), gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1 for the neutral species; cation (+1, mult 2) and anion (−1, mult 2) computed via finite difference. Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, no re-optimization at DFT level. All three SCFs converged; charge conservation f⁺ = 1.0000, f⁻ = 1.0000.
